message:
refactor: consolidate tests, fold edge cases into main tests, remove separators

Merge 35 individual test functions into 11 consolidated tests that cover
the same assertions. Fold JSON edge cases (empty values, unicode, leading
zeros, nested objects, duplicate keys, substring keys) into the main
jsonGetString/jsonGetInt/jsonGetArray tests. Merge integration tests
(split-window/new-window/send-keys body parsing) into a single test.
Combine all tmuxKeyLookup tests (named keys, navigation, C-letter,
invalid patterns) into one. Remove ASCII art section separators per
coding standards. Net -120 lines, same coverage.
